description.unified: Deals Physical Damage to enemies within range 2 times. The first hit knocks enemies down for [1.5sec->1.8 sec] [ (added) and reduces their Defense Penetration by 300 for 4 sec]. [ (removed) This skill applies Defense Penetration 800 higher].

Removes all harmful effects from all allies and increases their Attack by [302*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))->252(1+0.3Skill Level)], Attack Speed by [10%->36%], and Physical Defense by [91*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))->91(1+0.3Skill Level)] for [8 sec->6 sec].

Charges forward and deals Physical Damage 12 times to nearby enemies. [Caster is immune->Cannot be affected] by status ailments while casting, and the final hit freezes enemies for [2sec->2.4 sec] [ (removed) and increases Physical DMG taken by 16% for 10sec].

Every second, Attack increases by [10*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))->16(1+0.3Skill Level)], Status Resistance by [10->30], and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by [1%->1.5%]. This effect stacks up to [30->20] times. [ (added) At 20 or more stacks, Normal Attack damage increases by 100%.]

IV.unified: Status Resistance increases by [10->30] [for each stack->per stack].

dark.unified: [During the duration, Attack Speed is additionally increased by 24%->ATK increase amount increases by 50%].

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [3 sec->2 sec].

description.unified: [Smash] reduces the target’s ATK by 25% and increases the P.DMG they take by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases [targets->targets'] Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.
[Vortex] increases DMG by [ {0}%->50%], and its last hit increases the P.DMG the target takes by [ {1}%->{0}%] for 10 sec.
[Enrage] Changes the max number of stacks to [40->30] and upon gaining 30 stacks, increases own DEF Penetration by {0}.

dark.unified: Recovers HP [every->each] second equal to 10% of Attack Power, and for every 1% HP lost, all damage taken is reduced by [0.5%->0.6%].

description.unified: Max HP increases by {0}%, and Normal Attacks have a 15% chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power and freeze the target for [1 sec->2 sec].
